message.content: @startuml actor record participant "configuration" as config #D3D8E6#000000<> participant ekf <> #F5EBFF#000000 participant pathgenerator #C9BFFF#000000<> participant display #FFE4CC#000000<> participant diagnostics #DDA172#FFFFFF<> == initialize == record ->>config : 1 Get initial configuration\n(returns default values) activate config deactivate config box ""Initialize Objects"" LightGray note right of record: Create EKF instance for state estimation activate record rect rgb(240, 240, 240) { participant ":ekf_instance"\n(Estimated State:\nx,y,z,vx,vy,vz,\nor,qwqxqyqz)\nas eInstance ' Add internal structure to show what's being created rectangle "EKF Internal Structure"\nin eInstance {\n- Prediction Model\n- Measurement Update\n} \n create object "#ffcccc:eStateObject": Estimated State Object in eInstance link -[hidden]- eStateObject --|> eInstance } deactivate record end box loop iterate until stop signal received from user or system shutdown command issued by operator/administrator via GUI/control panel/etc... do note over record,pathgenerator,diagnostics:Main Control Loop:\nContinuously update position estimates based on sensor data fusion using Extended Kalman Filter algorithm implemented within
